User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Block API endpoints
Disallow: /api/

# Allow important pages
Allow: /
Allow: /ip-lookup
Allow: /api-docs
Allow: /about
Allow: /privacy
Allow: /terms
Allow: /contact
Allow: /blog

# Sitemap location (auto-generated by @astrojs/sitemap)
Sitemap: https://www.ippriv.com/sitemap-index.xml

# Crawl delay (be nice to crawlers)
Crawl-delay: 1
